name: Palm, Inc.
description: Palm, Inc. was an American technology company renowned for pioneering the personal digital assistant (PDA) market with the development of the PalmPilot. The company played a significant role in the evolution of mobile computing, later gaining prominence for its Treo line of smartphones. Palm specialized in hardware manufacturing and software development, including the Palm OS platform. Although the company was acquired by Hewlett-Packard in 2010 and eventually ceased operations, its legacy remains influential in the history of mobile devices and the development of modern smartphone technology.
